import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_DZ_To_Landing"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Display
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

# Create AEMO_SourceCopy Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_bronze =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if {source_path} not in dirs_in_bronze:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}")

from py4j.java_gateway import java_import
import json

# Function to execute SQL Queries 

def execute_query(db_query:str):
    db_port = 1433
    linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
    linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
    sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
    db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
    #print(linkedServiceProperties)
    access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

    df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("query", db_query) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .load()

    return df


def execute_raw_sql(db_query):
    
    db_port = 1433
    linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
    linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
    sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
    db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
    access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

    jdbc_url = f"jdbc:sqlserver://{sql_server_name}:1433;database={db_name};encrypt=true;hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net"
    java_import(spark._sc._gateway.jvm, "java.util.Properties")

    # Create Java Properties object
    props = spark._sc._gateway.jvm.Properties()
    props.setProperty("accessToken", access_token)
    props.setProperty("driver", "com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerDriver")
    
    # Establish a JDBC connection
    connection = spark._sc._gateway.jvm.java.sql.DriverManager.getConnection(jdbc_url, props)
    
    
    # Create a cursor object
    statement = connection.createStatement()
 
    # Pass in Query 
    statement.execute(db_query) 

    connection.commit()
    statement.close()
    connection.close()

# Determines if it is the files we want
def is_correct_file(name:str) -> bool:
    return name[:4] in ["mtrd"]

# Extract file name from path
import re

def extract_file_from_path(path:str):
    match = re.search(r'[^/]+$',path)
    if match:
        return match.group(0)
    return None
full_paths = [f for f in full_paths if is_correct_file(extract_file_from_path(f))]

# Get list of files
files = execute_query("SELECT * FROM [CTL].AEMO_SOURCE_TO_LANDING_FILES")
processed_files = [{"file":f.Name,"IsProcessed":f.IsProcessed} for f in files.collect()]

# Check if AEMO folder exists in landing container
dirs_in_landing =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_landing:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create NEM12 Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "NEM12" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12")

from datetime import datetime 
import re
sql_statements = []
for input_path in full_paths: # Only process uprocessed files
    file_name = extract_file_from_path(input_path)
#   ***<CSVIntervalData> tag check - Change Start***
#   Below logic check for <CSVIntervalData> tag in each file, the process will continue when the tag is found in the xml file
#   when the tag is not found it skip the process to move the file to landing container for further processing and also skip to add the file to AEMO_SOURCE_TO_LANDING_FILES config table,
#   the missing tag file will be added to 'AEMO_CORRUPT_FILES' config table for tracking/recording purposes
    df = spark.read.text(input_path, wholetext=True)
    df  = df.pandas_api()
    data = df.iloc[0].value
#   Extracing text from df
    pattern = r'<CSVIntervalData>(.*?)</CSVIntervalData>'

    matches = re.findall(pattern, data, re.DOTALL)
    
    if len(matches) == 0:
        print(f"<CSVIntervalData> tag not found in the source file: {file_name}")
        execute_raw_sql(f"INSERT INTO [CTL].AEMO_CORRUPT_FILES (FileName,ErrorMessage,[Timestamp]) VALUES ('{file_name}','<CSVIntervalData> tag not found in the source file','{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}');")
    else:
#   ***<CSVIntervalData> tag check - Change End***
        file_exists_in_db = list(filter(lambda x:(x["file"] == file_name), processed_files))
        #print("Does file exist", file_exists_in_db)
        if len(file_exists_in_db) == 0:
            try:
                mssparkutils.fs.mv(input_path, landing_path,overwrite=True)
                #sql_statements.append(f"INSERT INTO [CTL].AEMO_SOURCE_TO_LANDING_FILES ([Name],IsProcessed,[Timestamp]) VALUES ('{file_name}',1,GETDATE());\n")    
                execute_raw_sql(f"INSERT INTO [CTL].AEMO_SOURCE_TO_LANDING_FILES ([Name],IsProcessed,[Timestamp]) VALUES ('{file_name}',1,GETDATE());\n")
            except Exception as e:
                raise e
        elif not file_exists_in_db[0]["IsProcessed"]:
            try:
                mssparkutils.fs.mv(input_path, landing_path, overwrite=True)
                #sql_statements.append(f"UPDATE [CTL].AEMO_SOURCE_TO_LANDING_FILES SET IsProcessed = 1,[Timestamp] = GETDATE() WHERE [Name] = '{file_name}';\n")
                execute_raw_sql(f"UPDATE [CTL].AEMO_SOURCE_TO_LANDING_FILES SET IsProcessed = 1,[Timestamp] = GETDATE() WHERE [Name] = '{file_name}';\n")
            except Exception as e:
                raise e

#for statement in sql_statements:
#    execute_raw_sql(statement)
